span.p:
Booking to rescheduled (trigger email + .ics)
count + 1, reminders cleared

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
request_reschedule:
insert reschedule request (respond_by = window)
Email: reschedule_requested to mentor

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Customer picks new slot
(customer_reschedule, now permitted)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Email: reschedule_rejected
Customer keeps original OR cancels via cancel flow

span.p:
mentor_propose_reschedule:
insert offer (date + time range,
respond_by = window, was_late = late?)
Email: proposed to customer

Cron: offer expired
Booking unchanged at original time (no email)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Booking to cancelled (trigger email)
Customer refund 100%
+ 100% penalty on the initiator
